title: magnolia × alba
intro: Magnolia × alba, also known as the Mulan or Chinese white magnolia, is a hybrid plant species obtained by crossing Magnolia denudata and Magnolia liliiflora. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Magnolia × alba include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of depression. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are often used to promote relaxation and well-being.
